caption: FIGURE 4.3 The Honey-Moon [graphic]. Mezzotint, hand-colored. PRINTED FOR CARINGTON BOWLES, LONDON, JUNE 1777
FIGURE 4.3 The Honey-Moon [graphic]. Mezzotint, hand-colored. PRINTED FOR CARINGTON BOWLES, LONDON, JUNE 1777
FIGURE 4.3. The Honey-Moon [graphic]. Mezzotint, hand-colored. PRINTED FOR CARINGTON BOWLES, LONDON, JUNE 1777
description: A colored mezzotint of an 18th-century couple sitting together on a red sofa. The woman is in a blue dress with a white lace cap, and the man is in a yellow waistcoat and white breeches. The scene is set in an interior with heavy red curtains.
